title: 2 Pcs Plush Christmas Tree Flowers, 30cm Large Fluff Christmas Flower for Tree Decorations Xmas Tree Poinsettia Decorations Furry Flower Ornaments for Xmas Home Decor (Green)
features: Large Plush Christmas Flowers: 2 large plush Christmas flowers, 12 inches flower foe each. Perfect for adding a touch of luxury to your holiday decorations.
Reliable Quality: These plush artificial poinsettias are made of quality plush materials, and stamens of our Christmas flower picks are made from glitter berries.
Versatile Decors: Whether you want to decorate your Christmas tree, Christmas wreath, garland or table centerpiece, these faux plush flowers are ideal for you.
Christmas Decorations: Christmas poinsettia flowers come in festive colours to match your holiday theme. Mix and match colours and sizes to create stunning seasonal decorations.

Wide Applications: Plush artificial poinsettia flowers are both suitable for indoor and outdoor. Decorate Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, vases, flower arrangements, table centerpieces, parties, weddings.
